segments.en: Jared, I got a phone call from your homeroom teacher today. She's concerned about your grades this term.
segments.zh: Jared，你班主任今天给我打电话了。她对你这学期的成绩很担心。

segments.en: That was her point. Your grades are usually excellent, but they're only average this term. She said you won't be able to get into a good college if you don't make more of an effort.
segments.zh: 问题就在这里。你的成绩通常很优秀，但这学期只是中等。她说如果你不更加努力，就进不了好大学。

segments.en: To be honest, I don't think I want to go to college anymore.
segments.zh: 老实说，我觉得我不想上大学了。

segments.en: What? That's the first time I've heard about it. We'll talk about this more when your father gets home.
segments.zh: 什么？这是我第一次听说。我们等你爸爸回家再详细谈这件事。

segments.en: Question: What does Jared tell his mother?
segments.zh: 问题：Jared 告诉了他妈妈什么？
